name: @clawhub/human-rent
description: Human-as-a-Service for OpenClaw - Dispatch verified human agents to perform physical world tasks

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
✅ human-rent installed successfully!

Next steps:
1. Set up credentials: https://www.zhenrent.com/api/keys
2. Export environment variables:
   export ZHENRENT_API_KEY="your-key"
   export ZHENRENT_API_SECRET="your-secret"
3. Test connection: human-rent test
4. Dispatch tasks: human-rent dispatch "your instruction"

Documentation: https://github.com/ZhenRobotics/openclaw-human-rent
'

author: ZhenStaff
